name: Neggy Gemmy
description: '''Lindsey Elise French''' (born November 25, 1986), known professionally as Neggy Gemmy, is an American [[electronic music]]ian and singer-songwriter. Alongside [[George Clanton]] she established the independent record label 100% Electronica in 2015, and in 2019 they launched the first vaporwave music festival, 100% ElectroniCON.
